content.json:
# CashFlow NFR Dashboard
Monitoring dashboard for Non-Functional Requirements across all CashFlow services.

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize Total = count(), Successful = countif(success == true) by cloud_RoleName
| extend SuccessRate = round((Successful * 100.0) / Total, 2)
| project Service = cloud_RoleName, Total, Successful, Failed = Total - Successful, ['Success %'] = SuccessRate
| order by Service asc
content.title: Service Health & Uptime

content.query:
requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize SuccessCount = countif(success == true), TotalCount = count() by cloud_RoleName, bin(timestamp, 5m)
| extend SuccessRate = round((SuccessCount * 100.0) / TotalCount, 2)
| project timestamp, cloud_RoleName, SuccessRate
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Health Check Timeline (per service)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "cashflow.consolidation.processing_duration_ms"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize p50 = percentile(value, 50), p95 = percentile(value, 95), p99 = percentile(value, 99) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| project timestamp, ['p50 (ms)'] = round(p50, 1), ['p95 (ms)'] = round(p95, 1), ['p99 (ms)'] = round(p99, 1)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Consolidation Processing Latency (p50/p95/p99)

content.query:
requests
| where cloud_RoleName contains "consolidation"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize RequestCount = sum(itemCount) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| extend RequestsPerSec = round(RequestCount / 60.0, 1)
| project timestamp, ['Requests/s'] = RequestsPerSec
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Consolidation Throughput (req/s)
Production vs Consumption Delta

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "cashflow.messaging.dlq_faults"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize DLQFaults = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| project timestamp, ['DLQ Faults'] = DLQFaults
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Dead Letter Queue Faults

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "cashflow.consolidation.events_processed"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize EventsPerMin = sum(valueSum) by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| extend EventsPerSec = round(EventsPerMin / 60.0, 1)
| project timestamp, ['Events/s'] = EventsPerSec
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Event Ingestion Rate (events/s)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "cashflow.consolidation.eventual_consistency_ms"
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize p50 = percentile(value, 50), p95 = percentile(value, 95) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| project timestamp, ['p50 (ms)'] = round(p50, 1), ['p95 (ms)'] = round(p95, 1)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Eventual Consistency Delay (p50/p95)
